_comment: Curated stations for engineer unlock commodities. Used by the Smart Route to insert commodity_purchase stops. Keys are commodity symbols matching engineer-prerequisites.json unlock entries.

bromellite._note: Bromellite is mined from icy rings; also available at some refinery economy markets.

landmines._note: Landmines are sold at various planetary base black markets. Ashby City has a legal market. Check local commodity listings.

gold._note: Gold is available at many extraction and refinery economies. Ceos or Sothis are popular trade hubs.

painite._note: Painite can only be obtained by mining. Found in metallic ring hotspots. Cannot be purchased at a market.

osmium._note: Osmium is a mining commodity found in metallic/rocky rings. Cannot be purchased at a standard market.

modularterminals._note: Modular Terminals are primarily obtained via missions, but can be found at some high-tech industrial markets.
